# Pinned, hash-locked Python toolchain for scripts/generate-sbom.sh.
# Requires Python >= 3.10
#
# Installed with `pip install --require-hashes`, so every artifact pip resolves
# must match one of the sha256 hashes below (sdist + all platform wheels are
# listed per package). This is the supply-chain integrity guard: a tampered or
# re-uploaded PyPI artifact fails the hash check and aborts the install.
#
# Maintenance: Dependabot (pip ecosystem, /scripts — see .github/dependabot.yml)
# opens version-bump PRs and regenerates the hashes automatically. To bump or
# add a package by hand, edit the pin and re-run pip-compile --generate-hashes
# (pip-tools) or `hashin <pkg>` so its --hash lines stay in sync.

attrs==26.1.0 \

    --hash=sha256:d03ceb89cb322a8fd706d4fb91940737b6642aa36998fe130a9bc96c985eff32
